meaning: adj.形而上学的,纯粹哲学的,超自然的
examples: The metaphysical world outlook sees things as isolated, static and one-sided.
There is a metaphysical approach, too.
The New Metaphysical Art movement has some respected backers and an agenda that goes beyond protest.
More than a simple satire on conservative social mores, "Bridegroom" is a metaphysical mystery.
